name: Phoenix Fresh Start Bankruptcy Attorneys
description_short: Phoenix Fresh Start Bankruptcy Attorneys provides Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy filing services with affordable payment plans and included credit repair assistance across Arizona.
description_long:
Phoenix Fresh Start Bankruptcy Attorneys is a law firm specializing in personal bankruptcy filing services with offices in Phoenix, Goodyear, and Tucson, Arizona. The firm positions itself as an affordable alternative to traditional bankruptcy attorneys, emphasizing accessibility for clients already struggling with debt.

The firm offers Chapter 7 bankruptcy filings (asset liquidation for debt elimination) and Chapter 13 bankruptcy filings (debt restructuring with asset retention). Their services include initial free financial analysis consultations, bankruptcy petition preparation and filing, creditor harassment cessation, foreclosure prevention, wage garnishment protection, and repossession prevention. They provide a bankruptcy means test to determine Chapter 7 eligibility.

What distinguishes Phoenix Fresh Start is their stated commitment to post-filing credit repair—they include a free credit rebuilding service with every bankruptcy filing, claiming clients can achieve credit scores of 720+ within 12-18 months after discharge. They also differentiate on payment structure, offering affordable attorney fee payment plans that allow clients to pay both pre-filing and post-filing costs in installments rather than requiring large upfront retainers.

While the website presents compelling messaging around fresh starts and debt elimination, consumers should note that bankruptcy is a complex federal process with serious long-term credit consequences. The claims about 720+ credit scores in 12-18 months are ambitious and should be verified independently. Client testimonials are positive but limited in detail. The firm's geographic focus (Arizona only) and the inherent seriousness of bankruptcy make this appropriate only for consumers with genuine financial distress meeting federal bankruptcy criteria.
pros: Free initial financial analysis consultation with no obligation
Affordable attorney fees with installment payment plans (no large upfront retainer)
Free credit repair program included with every bankruptcy filing
Multiple office locations (Phoenix, Goodyear, Tucson) for accessibility
Offers both Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filing options with guidance on selection
Free bankruptcy means test to determine Chapter 7 eligibility
Addresses multiple debt crisis scenarios (foreclosure, wage garnishment, repossession, lawsuits)
cons: Credit score claims (720+ in 12-18 months) are not independently verified and may be overly optimistic
Limited testimonial detail available on website; mostly single-sentence reviews
No information about attorney credentials, experience levels, or specific qualifications
Bankruptcy remains on credit reports for 7-10 years despite their credit repair claims
No pricing transparency—actual costs and payment plan terms not disclosed on website
best_for: Arizona residents facing unmanageable unsecured debt with limited ability to pay large attorney retainers upfront
Homeowners or vehicle owners in Arizona facing foreclosure or repossession who may benefit from Chapter 13 protection
Consumers being actively sued by creditors or experiencing wage garnishment in Arizona
diagnosis: Phoenix Fresh Start Bankruptcy Attorneys is best for Arizona residents with genuine financial distress (unsecured debt, collection lawsuits, foreclosure, or wage garnishment) who need affordable bankruptcy filing services and value the included credit repair program. The critical caveat is that bankruptcy is a severe debt solution with 7-10 year credit report consequences; their aggressive credit score recovery claims should be independently verified, and consumers should confirm this firm's attorney credentials and experience before retaining services.
services: Chapter 7 bankruptcy filing and petition preparation
Chapter 13 bankruptcy filing and petition preparation
Free initial financial analysis and consultation
Bankruptcy means test administration and interpretation
Affordable payment plans for attorney fees
meta_description: Phoenix Fresh Start Bankruptcy Attorneys provides Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filing with affordable payment plans and credit repair assistance.
